programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond in Leonard's absence, but it's Sheldon's feelings that are crushed when Leonard returns from the North Sea.

programs.title: Home And Away
programs.desc: Will Remi pick up the guitar again? Lacey overcomes her grief to support Jo. Sonny withholds his good news.

programs.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programs.desc: In a gruelling face-off, can Kāhu take out a challenge win? Then, shocking twist no one saw coming changes the game for good.

programs.title: New Zealand Spy
programs.desc: Undercover as an athlete, coach, and chef, the spies are sent to Christchurch for the 1974 Unity Games to protect the Indian Foreign Minister from being assassinated.

programs.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programs.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Jon Richardson and Rosie Jones take on Joe Wilkinson and Phil Wang. Dr John Cooper Clarke joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. With Rachel Riley.
